requirement_topic.zh: 智能充电通信协议（ISO 15118 / OCPP）
requirement_topic.zht: 智能充電通訊協議（ISO 15118 / OCPP）

summary.en: EU Regulation 2023/1804 (AFIR) requires EV chargers at public access points to support ISO 15118 for Plug & Charge authentication and smart-charging data exchange (including V2G capability where applicable). OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) is not mandated by EU law as an essential requirement but is widely required by network operators and is referenced in AFIR implementation guidance for back-office communication. EN 50549-1/-2 applies to generating units (including V2G-capable chargers that can export to the grid) for connection conditions. [UNVERIFIED: exact AFIR article citation for ISO 15118 mandatory rollout timeline and V2G provisions pending 2026 delegated acts.]
summary.zh: 欧盟法规2023/1804（AFIR）要求公共充电桩支持ISO 15118，用于即插即充（Plug & Charge）认证及智能充电数据交换（含适用时的V2G功能）。OCPP（开放充电点协议）并非CE基本要求，但广泛被充电网络运营商要求，并在AFIR实施指引中被提及用于后台通信。EN 50549-1/-2适用于可向电网输出电力的发电单元（含具备V2G功能的充电桩）。[UNVERIFIED：AFIR具体条款及ISO 15118强制推行时间表，以及V2G相关授权法案（2026年）待确认。]
summary.zht: 歐盟法規2023/1804（AFIR）要求公共充電樁支援ISO 15118，用於即插即充（Plug & Charge）認證及智能充電數據交換（含適用時的V2G功能）。OCPP（開放充電點協議）並非CE基本要求，但廣泛被充電網絡運營商要求，並在AFIR實施指引中被提及用於後台通訊。EN 50549-1/-2適用於可向電網輸出電力的發電單元（含具備V2G功能的充電樁）。[UNVERIFIED：AFIR具體條款及ISO 15118強制推行時間表，以及V2G相關授權法案（2026年）待確認。]

standards_or_laws: EU Regulation 2023/1804 (AFIR) — Alternative Fuels Infrastructure Regulation
ISO 15118-1:2019, ISO 15118-2:2022, ISO 15118-20:2022 — Vehicle to Grid Communication Interface
OCPP 1.6 / OCPP 2.0.1 — Open Charge Point Protocol (Open Charge Alliance)
EN 50549-1:2019, EN 50549-2:2019 — Requirements for generating plants connected to distribution networks (relevant for V2G export)

summary.en: Chinese EV chargers commonly use GB/T 27930 for DC charger-to-BMS communication (conduction charging communication protocol) and GB/T 34658 for interoperability. These are technically incompatible with ISO 15118 in protocol stack, data model, and physical-layer assumptions. China does not currently require or commonly implement ISO 15118 or OCPP in its domestic charger ecosystem. [UNVERIFIED: GB/T 27930-2015 is the primary cited standard; a 2023 revision may exist — verify with SAC/NBS.]
summary.zh: 国内电动汽车充电桩普遍采用GB/T 27930（直流充电桩与电动汽车BMS通信协议）及GB/T 34658（互操作性）。上述标准在协议栈、数据模型及物理层假设上均与ISO 15118不兼容。中国目前不要求也不普遍实施ISO 15118或OCPP。[UNVERIFIED：主要引用GB/T 27930-2015；2023年修订版如存在，请向SAC/NBS确认。]
summary.zht: 國內電動汽車充電樁普遍採用GB/T 27930（直流充電樁與電動汽車BMS通訊協議）及GB/T 34658（互操作性）。上述標準在協議棧、數據模型及物理層假設上均與ISO 15118不相容。中國目前不要求也不普遍實施ISO 15118或OCPP。[UNVERIFIED：主要引用GB/T 27930-2015；2023年修訂版如存在，請向SAC/NBS確認。]

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2015 — Communication Protocol between Off-board Conductive Charger and Battery Management System for Electric Vehicles
GB/T 34658-2017 — Interoperability Test Specification for EV Conductive Charging System

gap.en: Fundamental protocol incompatibility: GB/T 27930 (Chinese DC charger-BMS comms) is not recognised or used in the EU. EU public charging networks and operators increasingly mandate ISO 15118 for Plug & Charge and smart/bidirectional charging, and OCPP for back-office interoperability. A CN-market charger designed only for GB/T 27930 will need a complete communication stack redesign — including new hardware modules, firmware, and certification — to meet EU operator requirements and AFIR obligations. V2G export additionally triggers EN 50549 grid-connection conditions.
gap.zh: 存在根本性协议不兼容：GB/T 27930（中国直流充电桩-BMS通信）在欧盟不被认可或使用。欧盟公共充电网络及运营商日益要求ISO 15118用于即插即充及智能/双向充电，并要求OCPP用于后台互操作。仅适配GB/T 27930的国产充电桩需完整重新设计通信协议栈——包括新增硬件模块、固件及认证——方能满足欧盟运营商要求及AFIR义务。若支持V2G输出，还须符合EN 50549电网接入条件。
gap.zht: 存在根本性協議不相容：GB/T 27930（中國直流充電樁-BMS通訊）在歐盟不被認可或使用。歐盟公共充電網絡及運營商日益要求ISO 15118用於即插即充及智能/雙向充電，並要求OCPP用於後台互操作。僅適配GB/T 27930的國產充電樁需完整重新設計通訊協議棧——包括新增硬件模組、固件及認證——方能滿足歐盟運營商要求及AFIR義務。若支援V2G輸出，還須符合EN 50549電網接入條件。

mandatory_status.target: conditional [UNVERIFIED] — ISO 15118 mandatory for public AC/DC chargers under AFIR for Plug & Charge by specified rollout dates; OCPP mandatory by operator contracts rather than EU law as CE essential requirement; EN 50549 mandatory where V2G export applies
mandatory_status.cn: not required — GB/T 27930 is the domestic standard; ISO 15118 and OCPP are not mandated in China

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / European Parliament and of the Council

compliance_verdict.en: High gap. A charger built for the Chinese GB/T 27930 ecosystem is not compatible with EU smart-charging requirements. ISO 15118 and OCPP support must be implemented to meet AFIR obligations and operator mandates. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 差距显著。面向中国GB/T 27930生态的充电桩与欧盟智能充电要求不兼容。须实施ISO 15118和OCPP支持，以满足AFIR义务及运营商要求。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 差距顯著。面向中國GB/T 27930生態的充電樁與歐盟智能充電要求不相容。須實施ISO 15118和OCPP支援，以滿足AFIR義務及運營商要求。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。

requirement_topic.zh: 电网互动 / V2G输出要求（EN 50549）
requirement_topic.zht: 電網互動 / V2G輸出要求（EN 50549）

summary.en: For EV chargers capable of bidirectional power flow (V2G / Vehicle-to-Grid), the charger acts as a generating unit when exporting power. EN 50549-1:2019 (LV, ≤110 kW) and EN 50549-2:2019 (MV) set the technical requirements for connection of generating plants to distribution networks, including voltage/frequency ride-through, anti-islanding protection, and reactive power control. These are harmonised under the Electricity Directive framework and relevant national grid codes transposing EU Network Codes (NC RfG). [UNVERIFIED: harmonisation status of EN 50549 under specific EU Directive/Regulation — verify with CENELEC or national DSO requirements.]
summary.zh: 对于具备双向功率流能力（V2G/车辆到电网）的充电桩，在输出电力时其作为发电单元运行。EN 50549-1:2019（低压，≤110 kW）和EN 50549-2:2019（中压）规定了发电装置接入配电网的技术要求，包括电压/频率穿越、防孤岛保护及无功功率控制。上述标准在电力指令框架及转化欧盟电网规范（NC RfG）的各国电网规则下实现协调。[UNVERIFIED：EN 50549在具体欧盟指令/法规下的协调状态——请向CENELEC或各国配电系统运营商确认。]
summary.zht: 對於具備雙向功率流能力（V2G/車輛到電網）的充電樁，在輸出電力時其作為發電單元運行。EN 50549-1:2019（低壓，≤110 kW）和EN 50549-2:2019（中壓）規定了發電裝置接入配電網的技術要求，包括電壓/頻率穿越、防孤島保護及無功功率控制。上述標準在電力指令框架及轉化歐盟電網規範（NC RfG）的各國電網規則下實現協調。[UNVERIFIED：EN 50549在具體歐盟指令/法規下的協調狀態——請向CENELEC或各國配電系統運營商確認。]

standards_or_laws: EN 50549-1:2019 — Requirements for generating plants to be connected in parallel with distribution networks — Part 1: Connection to a LV distribution network
EN 50549-2:2019 — Requirements for generating plants to be connected in parallel with distribution networks — Part 2: Connection to a MV distribution network
EU Commission Regulation 2016/631 (NC RfG) — Network Code on Requirements for Grid Connection of Generators
ISO 15118-20:2022 — V2G communication interface (bidirectional power transfer)

summary.en: China's V2G standards are nascent. GB/T 40429-2021 covers EV charging system technical requirements (AC), and GB/T 34657 covers interoperability, but a comprehensive V2G bidirectional grid-export standard equivalent to EN 50549 does not yet exist as a widely enforced domestic requirement. National standards for V2G grid connection are under development by SAC/TC114. [UNVERIFIED: status of V2G-specific GB/T standards as of 2026 — check SAC online.]
summary.zh: 中国V2G标准尚处起步阶段。GB/T 40429-2021涵盖电动汽车充电系统技术要求（交流），GB/T 34657涵盖互操作性，但与EN 50549相当的综合性V2G双向并网标准尚未作为国内普遍强制要求存在。SAC/TC114正在制定V2G并网国家标准。[UNVERIFIED：截至2026年V2G专项GB/T标准状态——请查阅SAC官网确认。]
summary.zht: 中國V2G標準尚處起步階段。GB/T 40429-2021涵蓋電動汽車充電系統技術要求（交流），GB/T 34657涵蓋互操作性，但與EN 50549相當的綜合性V2G雙向並網標準尚未作為國內普遍強制要求存在。SAC/TC114正在制定V2G並網國家標準。[UNVERIFIED：截至2026年V2G專項GB/T標準狀態——請查閱SAC官網確認。]

standards_or_laws: GB/T 40429-2021 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
GB/T 34657-2017 — Interoperability test specification for EV conductive charging system [UNVERIFIED: V2G export scope]

gap.en: CN chargers designed without V2G export capability have no direct EN 50549 equivalent and no domestic standard requiring these grid-connection technical specifications. Any CN charger adding V2G/bidirectional export for EU markets must newly comply with EN 50549 (anti-islanding, ride-through, reactive power), obtain DSO approval in each EU member state, and implement ISO 15118-20 for bidirectional communication. This represents a significant hardware and firmware development gap.
gap.zh: 未具备V2G输出功能的国产充电桩没有对应的EN 50549等效标准，国内亦无要求上述电网接入技术规格的强制标准。任何为欧盟市场新增V2G/双向输出功能的国产充电桩，须全新符合EN 50549（防孤岛、穿越能力、无功功率），并在各欧盟成员国取得配电系统运营商（DSO）批准，同时实施ISO 15118-20用于双向通信。这代表着显著的硬件及固件开发差距。
gap.zht: 未具備V2G輸出功能的國產充電樁沒有對應的EN 50549等效標準，國內亦無要求上述電網接入技術規格的強制標準。任何為歐盟市場新增V2G/雙向輸出功能的國產充電樁，須全新符合EN 50549（防孤島、穿越能力、無功功率），並在各歐盟成員國取得配電系統運營商（DSO）批准，同時實施ISO 15118-20用於雙向通訊。這代表著顯著的硬件及固件開發差距。

mandatory_status.target: mandatory where V2G/bidirectional export applies — EN 50549 applies as a condition of grid connection; national DSO approval required per member state [UNVERIFIED: harmonisation under specific Directive]
mandatory_status.cn: not yet enforced — V2G grid-export standards under development; no equivalent mandatory domestic requirement as of 2026 [UNVERIFIED]

source.publisher: CENELEC / European Committee for Electrotechnical Standardization

compliance_verdict.en: High gap for V2G-capable products. No Chinese domestic equivalent to EN 50549 exists; full new compliance work required for EU grid-export operation. Non-V2G chargers are not affected by EN 50549. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 对具备V2G功能的产品而言差距显著。国内无对应EN 50549的等效标准；须完整开展合规工作方可在欧盟实现电网输出运行。不具备V2G功能的充电桩不受EN 50549影响。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 對具備V2G功能的產品而言差距顯著。國內無對應EN 50549的等效標準；須完整開展合規工作方可在歐盟實現電網輸出運行。不具備V2G功能的充電樁不受EN 50549影響。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。
